Let's Talk

SAP & OPENTEXT

SAP & OpenText Consulting Services

End-to-end solutions designed to streamline operations and maximize business performance.

Driving Digital Transformation

Modern enterprises require more than just working systems — they need intelligent, connected, and scalable platforms. By combining SAP and OpenText technologies, we unify your financial processes, document management, and operational workflows into a seamless ecosystem.

Our consultants approach each project with a structured methodology, covering analysis, design, implementation, and optimization. Instead of generic solutions, we build flexible architectures tailored to your organization's unique needs.

NEXT-GEN

AI-Powered Business Processes

We enhance traditional ERP and content management systems with artificial intelligence capabilities.

auto_awesome

Auto Classification

Automated document classification

database

Data Extraction

Intelligent extraction and validation

shield

Exception Detection

Risk prevention and anomalies

lightbulb

Smart Insights

Process optimization recommendations

receipt_long

Vendor Invoice Management (VIM)

Managing supplier invoices efficiently is critical for financial accuracy and compliance.

bolt

Automation

Invoice processing becomes automated

speed

Speed

Approval cycles are accelerated

sync

Full Integration

Seamless SAP FI integration

visibility

Transparency

Full auditability and traceability

SAP & OpenText Support Services

Ensuring continuity, stability, and continuous improvement of your systems.

support_agent

Reliable Operations

  • checkEnd-user support
  • checkIssue resolution and troubleshooting
  • checkProcess enhancements
  • checkSystem adaptation for new requirements
sync_alt

Continuous Adaptation

As your organization evolves, your systems must evolve with it. We assist with onboarding new users, adapting to organizational changes, and implementing new functionalities when needed.

monitoring

Proactive Monitoring

Our approach goes beyond reactive support. We monitor system performance, identify potential risks early, and take preventive actions to ensure long-term stability.

Accelerate Your Digital Transformation

Future-proof your business processes with SAP and OpenText integration.
